sections.content: UP moved the right green box up! Let me check its new position. The green box was at rows 30-32, and it should now be at rows 29-31 or similar. Let me verify and continue moving it up and right to get it inside the charcoal box.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Green boxes:")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] == 8:
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\nCharcoal box (right):")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['boundary'][0][1] >= 44:
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}, children={n['children']}")

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for r in range(26, 33):
    print(f"Row {r}: {ascii_lines[r]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

Now I can see the layout clearly:
- Right green box: rows 27-29, cols 39-41 (moved up from rows 30-32)
- Right charcoal box: rows 26-30, cols 44-48
- Left green box: rows 30-32, cols 30-32 (stuck at purple bar)
The right green box needs to move RIGHT to get into the charcoal box. The charcoal box interior is at cols 45-47, rows 27-29. The green box is at cols 39-41, so it needs to move RIGHT by 4 columns to reach cols 43-45, then one more to reach cols 44-46, then one more to reach cols 45-47 (centered in the charcoal box).
Actually, looking at the ascii:
Row 27: ...ppppppNNNwwcwwwcwwwww...
Row 28: ...ppppppNWNwwcwwwcwwwww...
Row 29: ...ppppppNNNwwcwwwcwwwww...
The green box is at cols 39-41 (NNN, NWN, NNN). The charcoal box starts at col 44 (c). There's a gap of cols 42-43 (ww).
To get the green box inside the charcoal box (cols 44-48), I need to move RIGHT by 4 columns to get to cols 43-45, then one more to get to cols 44-46.
Let me move RIGHT 5 times to get the green box to cols 44-46, which would be inside the charcoal box horizontally.

<parameter=code>

action(['RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
